title: Senior Python Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Python Engineer to design and build scalable backend services. Requirements: 5+ years Python, FastAPI or Django, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes. Experience with distributed systems, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms (AWS or GCP). Bonus: machine learning pipelines, MLOps, data engineering with Spark or Airflow.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy ML models in production at scale. Required: Python, PyTorch or TensorFlow, scikit-learn, experience with vector databases (Chroma, Pinecone), and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Strong understanding of NLP, transformer architectures, and embedding models. Experience with LangChain, MLflow, and containerized deployments (Docker, Kubernetes).

title: Frontend Developer
description: React and TypeScript developer to build modern, performant web applications. Experience with Next.js, state management (Redux/Zustand), accessibility (WCAG), and design systems. Familiarity with REST/GraphQL APIs, testing (Jest, Playwright), and CI/CD. Bonus: experience with Figma, CSS-in-JS, and performance optimization.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Join our team to build full-stack applications using Python (FastAPI) and React/TypeScript. Requirements: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Git, CI/CD. Experience with cloud services (AWS Lambda, S3, CloudFront), authentication (OAuth2, JWT), and real-time features (WebSockets). Bonus: experience with microservices architecture and Terraform.

title: DevOps / SRE Engineer
description: We need a DevOps/SRE engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure. Requirements: AWS or GCP, Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, Helm, Prometheus, Grafana. Strong Linux skills, networking knowledge, and experience with CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI). Scripting in Python or Bash. Experience with incident management and SLO/SLI frameworks.
